settings.question: Are your products 100% natural?
settings.answer: Yes, all PRM HerboVilla products are made from 100% natural ingredients. We use authentic Ayurvedic herbs sourced from trusted suppliers and never add artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives.

settings.question: Are your products safe to use?
settings.answer: All our products are manufactured in a GMP-certified facility and undergo rigorous quality testing. However, we recommend consulting with a healthcare professional before starting any new supplement, especially if you are pregnant, nursing, or taking medications.

settings.question: Do your products have any side effects?
settings.answer: Our products are formulated using traditional Ayurvedic principles and are generally well-tolerated. Some individuals may experience mild digestive changes when starting a new herbal supplement. If you experience any adverse effects, discontinue use and consult a healthcare provider.

settings.question: How long does it take to see results?
settings.answer: Ayurvedic remedies work holistically and may take time to show results. Most customers report noticeable benefits within 2-4 weeks of consistent use. For chronic conditions, it may take 2-3 months to experience full benefits.

settings.question: What are your shipping charges?
settings.answer: We offer FREE shipping on all orders above ₹400. For orders below ₹400, a flat shipping fee of ₹50 applies. We ship across India via trusted courier partners.

settings.question: How long does delivery take?
settings.answer: Standard delivery takes 5-7 business days depending on your location. Metro cities usually receive orders within 3-5 business days. You will receive a tracking number once your order ships.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: Currently, we only ship within India. We are working on expanding our shipping to international destinations. Please check back soon or contact us for updates.

settings.question: Can I track my order?
settings.answer: Yes! Once your order is shipped, you will receive an email and SMS with tracking details. You can also track your order by logging into your account on our website.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: We accept returns within 7 days of delivery for unopened products in original packaging. For damaged or defective products, please contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photos.

settings.question: How do I request a refund?
settings.answer: To request a refund, please email us at contact@prmpharmaceuticals.com with your order number and reason for return. Our team will guide you through the process. Refunds are processed within 7-10 business days after we receive the returned product.

settings.question: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.answer:
We accept all major payment methods including:

  • Credit/Debit Cards (Visa, Mastercard, RuPay)
  • UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm)
  • Net Banking
  • Cash on Delivery (COD)

settings.question: Is my payment information secure?
settings.answer: Absolutely. We use industry-standard SSL encryption to protect your payment information. We never store your complete card details on our servers. All transactions are processed through secure payment gateways.

settings.title: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our products, shipping, and more.
